title: Cobblemon: Vocalized
body:
Cobblemon: Vocalized

Cobblemon: Vocalized is an open-source side-mod for Cobblemon, available on both Fabric and NeoForge. It introduces full voice-command functionality to Pokémon battles, allowing you to control your Pokémon using spoken commands instead of keyboard or mouse input.

Features (v1.0.0)

  • Use voice commands to execute Pokémon moves in Single Battles
  • Verbally forfeit in any battle
  • Recall your Pokémon from anywhere using voice commands
  • Customizable microphone input channel settings
  • Optional integration with Simple Voice Chat for advanced microphone configuration
  • Designed for future expansion with additional voice-controlled features

How It Works

Vocalized listens directly to your configured microphone input and processes recognized commands entirely on your local machine. No artificial intelligence models, cloud services, or external APIs are used, all voice recognition runs offline and does not require an internet connection.

When a valid battle command is detected, it is immediately translated into the corresponding in-game action. The mod is lightweight, fully configurable, and designed to integrate seamlessly with existing Cobblemon battle mechanics without transmitting or storing any voice data externally.

Installation

Fabric

  • Install the recommended Fabric Loader version for your Minecraft version
  • Install Fabric API
  • Install Cobblemon (Fabric version)
  • Place Fabric API and Cobblemon: Vocalized (Fabric) into your mods folder

NeoForge

  • Install the recommended NeoForge version for your Minecraft version
  • Install Kotlin for Forge
  • Install Cobblemon (NeoForge version)
  • Place Kotlin for Forge and Cobblemon: Vocalized (NeoForge) into your mods folder

Once installed, launch the game and configure your microphone settings as desired.

Support & Community

If you encounter installation issues or want to report bugs, suggest features, or contribute, join the Cobblemon Discord server or visit the gitlab repository.

Open Source

Cobblemon: Vocalized is fully open-source. Contributions, pull requests, and community feedback are welcome.
